name: Rhode Island
author: rslurry
description: Uses 2023 LODES data for the Rhode Island area.  Includes the full state of Rhode Island, eastern Connecticut, and southern Massachusetts.  Covers from Norwich in the west to New Bedford in the east.  Includes demand for PVD airport; CCRI (Lincoln, Liston, Knight, Newport, Westerly, CCRI Woonsocket), Bryant, RIC, PC, RISD, Brown, RWU (Bristol and Providence), Johnson & Wales (Providence and Harborside), NEIT (Post and Cranston), URI (Kingston and Narragansett Bay), Naval College, Salve Regina, Bristol CC, UConn Avery Point, Mitchell College, Connecticut College, UMASS Dartmouth universities; Cardines Field, Centreville Bank Stadium, Providence Performing Arts Center, Amica Mutual Pavilion, Rhode Island Convention Center, Twin River Casino, Roger Williams Park, Narragansett Brewery, Lincoln Wood State Park, Old Slater Mill, JFK Memorial Park, Battleship Cove, Lizzie Borden House, Childrens Museum of Greater Fall River, Capron Park Zoo, Oakland Beach, Providence Childrens Museum, RISD Museum, Easton Beach , Scarborough State Beach, Narragansett Town Beach, Thames St, Mautucket by the Sea Beach, East Matunuck State Beach, Roger Wheeler State Beach, Watch Hill, East Beach, Camp Yawgoog, Mohegan Sun, Mystic Aquarium, Mystic Seaport Museum, Dodd Stadium, Thompson Speedway, Rhode Island State House, Government Office, Barrington Shopping Center, RK Newport Towne Center, Aquidneck Shopping Centre, Portugalia Marketplace, Safe Harbor New England Boatworks, Electric Boat Quonset Point, Ship Yar, Providence Place, Warwick Mall, Garden City, SouthCoast Marketplace, RI Hospital Women’s and Infants Hasbro, Our Lady of Fatima, Miriam Hospital, Landmark Medical Center, Roger Williams Hospital, South County Hospital, Westerly Hospital, Newport Hospital, Kent Hospital, Carlton Memorial, Saint Anne’s, Sturdy Memorial, Lawrence + Memorial Hospital, Backus Hospital, Day Kimball Healthcare; and Naval Station Newport.
search_aliases: พรอวิเดนซ์
